name: Niacinamide
summary: Niacinamide (nicotinamide) is a vitamin B3 form used to prevent or treat niacin deficiency and support NAD+ metabolism. It does not provide nicotinic acid's lipid-lowering effect.
description: Non-flushing vitamin B3 form and NAD+ precursor; clinically relevant for deficiency but not lipid lowering.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
